title: cylicodaphne citrata
intro: Cylicodaphne citrata, also known as the Lemon leaf tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cylicodaphne citrata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils for its medicinal purposes, with some parts also being used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and astringent properties.
